title: Totem of Undying Gohan

body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f1751ee9775b04c8e4e8ddd0abbae104fe3228a.png)

# 🥉 Dragon Ball Z Totem – Gohan

Step into battle with **Gohan**, the hidden powerhouse of Dragon Ball Z.
This resource pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** with a pixel-art version of Gohan, capturing his youthful determination and strength. Whether you’re venturing into caves or facing bosses, Gohan will always be there to give you another chance at survival.

---

✨ **Current Characters Available:** 

- **Goku Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-goku)
- **Vegeta Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-vegeta)
- **Gohan Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-gohan)
- **Picolo Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-picolo)
- **Frieza Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-frieza)
- **Roshi Totem** [Download Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/totem-of-undying-roshi)

---

## ✨ Features

✔️ Custom **Totem of Undying** texture – Gohan

✔️ Works in **vanilla Minecraft** (no OptiFine required)

✔️ Compatible with **all versions (1.8 → 1.21+)**

✔️ Lightweight & multiplayer-safe

✔️ Perfect for **Dragon Ball Z fans** and **anime survival builds**

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the `.zip` file.
2. Place it inside your `.minecraft/resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable it through **Minecraft → Settings → Resource Packs**.

---

## 📌 Notes

* This is a **fan-made pack** inspired by Dragon Ball Z.
* All rights belong to the original creators.
